positive: Minimalist, continuous-line illustration of a leaping fox surrounded by stylized geometric flora and constellations. The style is high-contrast, modern tattoo flash meets Scandinavian folk art. The fox is the central, dynamic element, depicted in sharp silhouette against a negative space background. Use a monochromatic palette of deep indigo, charcoal gray, and pops of burnt orange for the flora. Composition must be circular and balanced, suitable for a centered T-shirt graphic. Clean lines, dot work accents, highly detailed yet scalable vector quality. Studio lighting setup, crisp edges, poster art quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, noisy, low resolution, extra limbs, cropped, out of frame, gradient background, photo, realism, hyperdetailed, complex background
